proposal.focus_keyword: ai email automation for service businesses
proposal.working_title: AI Email Automation for Service Businesses: The 2026 Playbook for Sequences That Convert Without Sounding Robotic
proposal.one_line_angle: Most AI-email guides pitch tools; this is the operator playbook showing service businesses which sequence patterns ship pipeline in 2026, with the prompts and CRM triggers AI consultants actually run.
outline_bullets: The five AI email-sequence patterns service businesses run in 2026 (and which of them Deloitte's clients keep botching)
Where AI email automation breaks: the four hand-offs between the LLM, the CRM, and the human reply box that kill conversion
How to instrument AI email sequences so you measure pipeline impact and reply quality, not just open rates

buyer_prompts: What is the best way to automate email sequences
Top AI consulting agencies for marketing automation
discovery_evidence.agent_override_rationale: Algorithmic pick_top_candidate selected 'forgot password explained' from ga4_high_traffic_gap (score 7.87 * weight 1.1 = 8.66); this is FM's /forgot-password app auth page, not an editorial topic. Remaining high-score GA4 candidates were FM-internal product/course slugs. Falling back to highest-scoring Searchable AEO candidate where the 0% FM coverage + dominant competitor citations represents a genuine AEO gap. Focus keyword narrowed from generic 'email automation' to 'ai email automation for service businesses' for editorial specificity.
